name: unreal-skills
description: Portable Unreal Engine agent skills from the unreal-harness: verification (capture-pose, visual/video-critique, see), authoring (icon, texture, gimp-import, key-indicator-helper, progress-video), design & docs (architect, docs), advisors (ue-expert, position, npc_logic, networking, gamelift), analysis (neo4j graph projection), and build guidance. Assumes the UnrealMCP tool surface (harness MCP server + editor plugin) is reachable; harness-operating skills (onboard, bootstrap, automated-tester, refactor) remain in the harness repo.
